'''thafozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaikai|zaikai]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-f-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaikai|zaikai]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thafozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæfezeth|thæfezeth]] || [[word:thæfezej|thæfezej]] || [[word:thæfezesh|thæfezesh]] || [[word:thæfeze|thæfeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thafofozoth|thafofozoth]] || [[word:thafofozoj|thafofozoj]] || [[word:thafofozosh|thafofozosh]] || [[word:thafofozo|thafofozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafozoth|thafozoth]] || [[word:thafozoj|thafozoj]] || [[word:thafozosh|thafozosh]] || [[word:thafozo|thafozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafofzoth|thafofzoth]] || [[word:thafofzoj|thafofzoj]] || [[word:thafofzosh|thafofzosh]] || [[word:thafofzof|thafofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thafozotho|thafozotho]] || [[word:thafozojo|thafozojo]] || [[word:thafozosho|thafozosho]] || [[word:thafozoko|thafozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thafozoth|thafozoth]] || [[word:thafozoj|thafozoj]] || [[word:thafozosh|thafozosh]] || [[word:thafozo|thafozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thafozothol|thafozothol]] || [[word:thafozojol|thafozojol]] || [[word:thafozoshol|thafozoshol]] || [[word:thafozokol|thafozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thafozothotho|thafozothotho]] || [[word:thafozojojo|thafozojojo]] || [[word:thafozoshosho|thafozoshosho]] || [[word:thafozoko|thafozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thafozothon|thafozothon]] || [[word:thafozojon|thafozojon]] || [[word:thafozoshon|thafozoshon]] || [[word:thafozokon|thafozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thafozothoro|thafozothoro]] || [[word:thafozojoro|thafozojoro]] || [[word:thafozoshoro|thafozoshoro]] || [[word:thafozokoro|thafozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
